accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; Section 546 of the PHSA is correctly identified as the first responder training grant program.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all amendments described match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes and modifies grants for first responder training.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies amendments to Section 546 of the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or eligibility carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Notes the fiscal years 2026 through 2030 funding period.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the terminology broadening, expansion beyond opioids, and reauthorization of funding.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive throughout with no editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Public Health Service Act and Section 546 are correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Dollar amounts and fiscal years match the bill exactly.
